name: rabbit-auto-evolve
summary: rabbit-auto-evolve — self-driving rabbit loop that continuously fetches open rabbit-managed issues, triages, dispatches TDD subagents, merges PRs into dev, tags releases, and is fired on a fixed cadence by the system cron where available (with a durable CronCreate fallback where crontab is blocked; Inv 32) until the user issues an explicit stop.
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code or rabbit gains a native always-on autonomous-agent mode that supersedes this skill
